declarations.description:
A scroll-driven storytelling layout orchestrator. Establishes a sticky visual
stage synchronized with a scrollable narrative track and broadcasts real-time
scroll state as CSS custom properties, enabling fully composable animations
without external dependencies.
declarations.name: EffectStorytelling

cssProperties.description: Gap between stage and track in side-by-side layouts.
cssProperties.name: --uibit-effect-storytelling-gap

cssProperties.description: Flex basis for the track in side-by-side layouts.
cssProperties.name: --uibit-effect-storytelling-track-width

cssProperties.description: Flex basis for the stage in side-by-side layouts.
cssProperties.name: --uibit-effect-storytelling-stage-width

cssProperties.description: Transition applied to built-in mode animations.
cssProperties.name: --uibit-effect-storytelling-transition

cssProperties.description: IntersectionObserver visibility threshold (0–1) for step activation.
cssProperties.name: --uibit-effect-storytelling-step-threshold

cssParts.description: Inner stage container; use for perspective transforms.
cssParts.name: stage-inner

slots.description: The sticky visual area. Locks to the viewport while scrolling through the track. Direct children or elements with `[data-step]` are treated as discrete visual layers and managed by the active `mode`.
slots.name: stage

slots.description: The scrollable narrative content. Its scroll depth drives the animation timeline. Mark individual sections with `class="step"` or `[data-step]` for step-based tracking.
slots.name: track

slots.description: A passive z-indexed layer above the stage. Use for progress indicators, chapter labels, or back-to-top controls.
slots.name: overlay

members.name: mode
members.description:
Built-in animation mode applied to stage children on scroll.
- `sequence-fade`: steps fade in/out as the active track step changes (default).
- `reveal-wipe`: second stage child wipes over the first, driven by raw scroll progress.
- `layer-depth`: steps recede in 3D as focus shifts to the active step.
- `zoom-focus`: steps scale and blur relative to their distance from the active scroll position.

members.name: trackAlignment
members.description:
Spatial layout of the track relative to the stage.
- `right`: track on right, stage on left (default, Apple-style).
- `left`: track on left, stage on right.
- `center`: stage full-width, track centered narrow column.
- `overlap`: stage full-width, track freely overlaid.

members.name: timelineScope
members.description:
Whether the scroll progress is tracked against the viewport or a local
overflow container. Currently informational for user CSS; internal tracking
always uses the nearest scroll ancestor.

members.name: snapPoints
members.description:
When true, applies `scroll-snap-align: start` to narrative step elements
inside the track slot.

members.name: _computeProgress
members.description:
Returns a 0–1 value representing how far the component has been scrolled
through. 0 = component top at viewport top; 1 = component bottom at viewport bottom.

members.name: _modeSequenceFade
members.description:
sequence-fade — each child fades in as its corresponding track step becomes active.
Children slide slightly on the Z axis for a subtle depth cue.

members.name: _modeRevealWipe
members.description:
reveal-wipe — the second stage child wipes in from left to right as progress increases.
Additional children are hidden. Works best with two overlapping visual layers.

members.name: _modeLayerDepth
members.description:
layer-depth — active step is brought forward; siblings recede in 3D space.
Requires `transform-style: preserve-3d` on the parent (applied via stage-inner).

members.name: _modeZoomFocus
members.description:
zoom-focus — a continuous effect where steps scale up and become sharp as the
scroll position passes through them, then recede and blur as it moves on.

events.description: Emitted on each scroll tick with current progress (0–1) and active step index.
events.name: story-progress

events.description: Emitted when the active narrative step changes.
events.name: story-step

attributes.name: mode
attributes.description:
Built-in animation mode applied to stage children on scroll.
- `sequence-fade`: steps fade in/out as the active track step changes (default).
- `reveal-wipe`: second stage child wipes over the first, driven by raw scroll progress.
- `layer-depth`: steps recede in 3D as focus shifts to the active step.
- `zoom-focus`: steps scale and blur relative to their distance from the active scroll position.

attributes.name: trackAlignment
attributes.description:
Spatial layout of the track relative to the stage.
- `right`: track on right, stage on left (default, Apple-style).
- `left`: track on left, stage on right.
- `center`: stage full-width, track centered narrow column.
- `overlap`: stage full-width, track freely overlaid.

attributes.name: timelineScope
attributes.description:
Whether the scroll progress is tracked against the viewport or a local
overflow container. Currently informational for user CSS; internal tracking
always uses the nearest scroll ancestor.

attributes.name: snapPoints
attributes.description:
When true, applies `scroll-snap-align: start` to narrative step elements
inside the track slot.

declarations.name: styles
declarations.default: css` :host { display: block; position: relative; /* Internal layout tokens */ --_stage-height: var(--uibit-effect-storytelling-stage-height, 100vh); --_gap: var(--uibit-effect-storytelling-gap, 0rem); --_track-width: var(--uibit-effect-storytelling-track-width, 1fr); --_stage-width: var(--uibit-effect-storytelling-stage-width, 1fr); --_transition: var(--uibit-effect-storytelling-transition, 0.45s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)); } /* ── Outer container ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */ .outer { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: var(--_gap); } /* ── Stage wrapper (sticky) ───────────────────────────────────────────────── */ .stage-wrapper { position: sticky; top: 0; height: var(--_stage-height); overflow: hidden; flex-shrink: 0; flex: 1 1 0; } .stage-inner { position: relative; width: 100%; height: 100%; overflow: hidden; } /* ── Overlay wrapper ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */ .overlay-wrapper { position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 10; pointer-events: none; } .overlay-wrapper ::slotted(*) { pointer-events: auto; } /* ── Track wrapper ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */ .track-wrapper { flex: 1 1 0; min-height: var(--_stage-height); } /* ── track-alignment: right (default) — stage left, track right ──────────── */ :host([track-alignment="right"]) .outer, :host(:not([track-alignment])) .outer { flex-direction: row; } :host([track-alignment="right"]) .stage-wrapper, :host(:not([track-alignment])) .stage-wrapper { order: 0; } :host([track-alignment="right"]) .track-wrapper, :host(:not([track-alignment])) .track-wrapper { order: 1; } /* ── track-alignment: left — track left, stage right ─────────────────────── */ :host([track-alignment="left"]) .outer { flex-direction: row; } :host([track-alignment="left"]) .stage-wrapper { order: 1; } :host([track-alignment="left"]) .track-wrapper { order: 0; } /* ── track-alignment: center / overlap — stage full-width, track on top ──── */ :host([track-alignment="center"]) .outer, :host([track-alignment="overlap"]) .outer { display: block; position: relative; } :host([track-alignment="center"]) .stage-wrapper, :host([track-alignment="overlap"]) .stage-wrapper { width: 100%; flex: none; } :host([track-alignment="center"]) .track-wrapper, :host([track-alignment="overlap"]) .track-wrapper { position: relative; z-index: 2; /* Pull track up to visually start at the same position as the stage */ margin-top: calc(-1 * var(--_stage-height)); min-height: var(--_stage-height); /* Track items need a transparent or semi-transparent background */ pointer-events: none; flex: none; width: 100%; } :host([track-alignment="center"]) .track-wrapper ::slotted(*), :host([track-alignment="overlap"]) .track-wrapper ::slotted(*) { pointer-events: auto; } /* Center variant: constrain track width to a readable column */ :host([track-alignment="center"]) .track-wrapper { max-width: 36rem; margin-inline: auto; } /* ── Snap points ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */ :host([snap-points]) .track-wrapper { scroll-snap-type: y mandatory; } /* ── Reduced motion ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */ @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .stage-inner * { transition: none !important; animation: none !important; } } `
